subcodes.first_line: O beloved of heart and soul, render thanks unto God that thou hast been made the subject of tests and fallen into grievous trials [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب دل و جان شکر کن خدا را که مورد امتحان شدی و در افتتان شدید افتادی
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
